_fixture_meta.source: DOCS-DERIVED, LAYER-2 RECONCILED (2026-06-26). Field shapes captured from the Paddle webhook simulator; the 'approved' status literal verified against Paddle docs + paddle-go-sdk constants. Holds the APPROVED state of the updated delivery.
_fixture_meta.reconcile: RESOLVED: created(pending_approval)->updated(approved) is the live lifecycle; adjustment.updated carries the same data.action / data.transaction_id as the created event. NOTE: the simulator emits BOTH created and updated as pending_approval (it does not simulate Paddle's approval), so the approved transition is verified from docs, not the simulator. Same enums as adjustment.created.json.
_fixture_meta.locks: data.action='refund', data.status='approved' (verified literal — the delivery that authorizes reversal), data.transaction_id links to a purchases row, totals are STRINGS
